title: Parapolystichum novoguineense
taxonomy: Parapolystichum novoguineense is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of evergreen fern native to New Guinea. The classification of Parapolystichum novoguineense is further categorized under the genus Parapolystichum and the order Polypodiales. Within the kingdom Plantae, it is classified as a vascular plant with fern-like characteristics. This classification reflects its unique position within the plant kingdom.
